name: Jess
subject: before she takes the mic
body:
Will you fight with us to reject Trump's agenda?
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976bab/2ae112ef/139005e4/357d778e/3166911776/VEsH/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976bab/2ae112ef/139005e4/357d778e/3166911776/VEsE/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
Peter, in just hours, Kirsten will make her first major speech as a presidential candidate--in front of Trump International.
These past two years, we've seen the president:
* Declare a national emergency at our border to secure funding for his wasteful wall
* Pull out of the Paris climate accord, a landmark effort to stop climate change
* Prioritize corporate profits and greed over the lives of working families
* Roll back health care, women's rights and reproductive freedoms
* Fan the flames of racism, hate and division

And with the filing of Special Counsel Mueller's investigative report, we could learn just how far the coordination between Trump's campaign and Russia really went. But we don't have to wait to know the truth about Donald Trump. **We know exactly who he is --and this is our moment to send a clear message that Trump's corruption, greed and hatred are not who we are.**
But it'll only work if we raise our voices together. So before Kirsten takes the mic, I want to make sure she knows how many of you are fighting with us to reject Trump's agenda. We're 425 names short of the 25,000 we need to let Trump know: _Enough is enough_. **[Please--add your name right now to stand against Trump and be part of the movement that knows brave wins!](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "http://act.kirstengillibrand.com/kg-trump-rally?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk2965-su-gfp-nd")**
Here's the best link: **[http://act.kirstengillibrand.com/kg-trump-rally](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "http://act.kirstengillibrand.com/kg-trump-rally?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk2965-su-gfp-nd")**
Jess Fassler
Campaign Manager
Gillibrand 2020
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Gillibrand 2020 email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976bab/2ae112ef/139005e4/357d7788/3166911776/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
Contributions or gifts to Gillibrand 2020 are not tax-deductible. Gillibrand 2020 does not accept contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate and/or trade association PACs, or "for profit" business entities, including but not limited to sole proprietorships, partnerships, and LLCs.

name: Team Beto
subject: A chance to do something BIG (coming to your community)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

In just six days, we have a chance to do something really big
together. Something
important -- for our country and our campaign to elect Beto. Please stick
with us for a few moments while we unravel this.

The connected crises we face -- in our economy, democracy, and climate --
are monumental. This moment in history demands that each of us give our
very best. It demands that we work together to accomplish truly ambitious
things.

The best way to fight back against the fear, short-sightedness, and
division in this country is through a massive, people-powered movement
united by our values and ambitions for ourselves, our communities, and our
country.

Together, we can create a government that serves people instead of
corporations. Where anyone who’s sick can access quality health care no
matter how much they make. Where immigrants are welcome. Where people who
haven’t even been convicted of a crime aren’t locked in jail just because
they can’t afford bail. Where decades-long wars finally end. Where we
overhaul our economy to address the urgent threat of climate change. And a
lot more.

If that’s a vision that you believe in, make it count: Join us on March
30, when we’re officially kicking off this campaign with nationwide
livestream watch parties of Beto’s launch rally in El Paso.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/signup-watch-party/?source=ema20190324&t=1001&akid=25481%2E444211%2EAdk3vo ]It looks like there’s no party being planned yet in your community.
Can you step up to host one? It’s easy, and we’ve got handy guides and a
skilled team to help.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/signup-watch-party/?source=ema20190324&t=1002&akid=25481%2E444211%2EAdk3vo ]Host a livestream party »

We have an opportunity to remake this country into one that’s not defined
by fear and paranoia, but instead embraces the simple notion that we
should love our neighbors and that every person deserves to live with
dignity.

We can do it, but it’s going to take all of us. March 30 is our moment.
It’ll be the launchpad for our nationwide voter contact program. Please
don’t miss it.

Onward,

Team Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190324footer&t=1003&refcode2=25481_444211_Adk3vo&akid=25481%2E444211%2EAdk3vo

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=25481%2E444211%2EAdk3vo

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Andrew Janz
subject: holy cow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Peter -- okay, I won't lie. Sometimes it's fun to laugh at Republican Rep. Devin Nunes: Nunes is so furious at a parody Twitter account called "Devin Nunes Cow" that he is suing Twitter for....250 million dollars! (seriously) While it's funny to laugh at Nunes throwing a fit because he was mocked on the internet, there's nothing funny about Nunes' record: He's a rightwing extremist who supports the Republican voter suppression agenda, and he's done everything in his power to thwart the investigation into whether Trump colluded with a foreign power to steal the 2016 election. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Peter -- okay, I won't lie. _Sometimes it 's fun to laugh at Republican Rep. I launched the Voter Protection Project earlier this year to fight voter suppression. Defeating Devin Nunes has absolutely got to be one of our goals.
**[We aren 't suing anyone for $250 million -- but I'd love it if you'd chip in $25 to send Nunes and his friends packing:](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d07a2/72412298/474b7fa1/6100d4ae/3807710559/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJudW5lc192c19jb3ciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzE5MDMyNF9OdW5lczJfVTFfWDIiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nunes_vs_cow?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190324_Nunes2_U1_X2&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9+-+We+arenrsquot+suing+anyone+for+250+milli&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190324_Nunes2_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_190324_Nunes2_U1_X2")**
| [Chip in $25 -> ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d07a2/72412298/474b7fa1/6100d491/3807710559/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJudW5lc192c19jb3ciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzE5MDMyNF9OdW5lczJfVTFfWDIiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nunes_vs_cow?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190324_Nunes2_U1_X2&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=10+-+Chip+in+25+rarr+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190324_Nunes2_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_190324_Nunes2_U1_X2")
---
We need to get this job done,
Andrew
_Andrew Janz_
_President, Voter Protection Project_

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d07a2/72412298/474b7fa1/6100d490/3807710559/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=11+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190324_Nunes2_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_190324_Nunes2_U1_X2")

But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d07a2/72412298/474b7fa1/6100d492/3807710559/VEsHBg/ "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=13+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190324_Nunes2_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_190324_Nunes2_U1_X2")

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: NO COLLUSION OR OBSTRUCTION
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Let’s make a statement. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=91139fb2a27f2196903b7357214a7c459e7593df6da446d710e70f200518e6750b6f5e4a986d79180895ec1ed88e99405621f676c1eea29e)
---
_**WITCH HUNT INVESTIGATION CONCLUDED: NO COLLUSION OR OBSTRUCTION**_
Friend,

After more than _2 YEARS_ , and **$25 MILLION **taxpayer dollars spent, the Mueller Report proves what I have been saying since Day One: _**NO COLLUSION, NO OBSTRUCTION -- COMPLETE EXONERATION.**_

Democrats worked with the Fake News Media for 2 years orchestrating this Nasty Witch Hunt to use our government as a weapon to take away the votes of 63 MILLION Americans.

After they lied to the American people, Nancy Pelosi, Democratic leadership, and all of the 2020 Democratic candidates raised MILLIONS of dollars off of their phony Witch Hunt!

Democrats and the Fake News media have proven that there is no line they won't cross, so we need to fight back _BIGGER AND BETTER THAN EVER BEFORE._

That's why I am activating a short-term QUADRUPLE-MATCH for my best supporters only, _the ones who stood by my side through the entire Witch Hunt._

My campaign team will send me a list of everyone who donated at this critical moment. I know I’ll see you on there, Friend.

---

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: the message I took to Trump's hotel
body:
| | |
---
Peter, when I think about our national anthem, I think about the question it asks:

_Oh say does that star-spangled banner yet wave, over the land of the free and the home of the brave?_
It's a call to reflect not just on who we are, but who we are at our best. Are we people who face challenges head-on, get up again and again, take the next step and fight the next fight?

This is a question for us now. Because Trump is tearing apart the moral fabric of our country, demonizing the vulnerable and punching down at those in need.
**President Trump is a coward. But Americans are not.**

We can show it by defeating him. I'm running for president to provide leadership worthy of the everyday bravery of Americans like you.
Let's show our strength by coming together with one voice, one movement to fight for opportunity, equality, compassion and justice. Together, when we fight for our values, brave can win. **But like the generations before us, we 'll have to fight for it, and I'm asking you to help me build a campaign that does just that. **
**[Rush your gift today, while we've got Trump's attention: Donate $20.20 to let him know we're coming for the White House and determined to create a better future. ](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976c49/2ae112ef/13ad5308/357d7147/2669627476/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5MDYtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2906-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&amount=20.20")**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2906-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| [Donate $20.20](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976c49/2ae112ef/13ad5308/357d7141/2669627476/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5MDYtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2906-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=20.20")
---
| | [Donate $50](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2906-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| [Other](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976c49/2ae112ef/13ad5308/357d7143/2669627476/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5MDYtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2906-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---
We deserve a president who inspires us to stand for something greater than ourselves. The power lies with us.

When I first ran for Congress, I set my sights on a district that nobody thought I could win--except my mother. People told me: "It has more cows than Democrats!" But I took those long odds, and I won. And the next election, I won again--this time by double-digit margins.
That's because I never forgot who I came to Washington to serve. That's why I stood up to the big banks and voted against the Wall Street bailout when it was going to leave middle-class families holding the bag. Even though I was told it would "end my career."

That's why I've fought the NRA with bills to stop gun trafficking and enforce universal background checks.
It's why I stood up to Congress to finally make insider trading illegal. No one in our government should be lining their pockets as a public servant--and I can think of someone who could use that reminder.

And I wasn't afraid to take on colleges, Congress or even the Pentagon on behalf of survivors of sexual assault and harassment.

And I'm proud to say that I've stood up to Donald Trump more than anyone else in the Senate.

As president, I'll keep standing up--for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal to save our planet, paid family leave and universal pre-K.
I will get money out of politics, because behind every unsolvable problem is a corrupt, greedy organization using money to protect the status quo. President Trump talked about draining the swamp, but he's only made it worse. In his vision for the country, the billionaires set the agenda--in ours, you will.
By donating today, you'll add your voice to the message we sent at Trump International: **[We will not let anyone or anything divide us. We will not cede control of our country to corruption, greed and the interests of a few. We will keep showing up, and we will keep fighting back.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976c49/2ae112ef/13ad5308/357d7143/2669627476/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5MDYtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2906-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
I believe, in my bones, that we can do this. And I know that years from now, we will look back on this defining moment in our history, and we'll be able to say that we did the right thing.

We stood up, locked arms and proved to America, and the world, that when people come together to drive out darkness...
**Hope rises.

Fear loses.

And brave wins.**

Kirsten
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976c49/2ae112ef/13ad5308/357d7142/2669627476/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
---

name: Tina Smith
subject: Become a citizen co-sponsor of the EACH Woman Act and help us repeal the Hyde Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Sign on as a citizen co-sponsor in the fight to defend reproductive freedom.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-march?refcode=rtw_20190324_em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto") Friend, In a minute, I'm going to ask you to sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of an important piece of legislation. But first, let me take a minute to explain why this is so critical. Over the past two years, we've seen the Republicans and their conservative base do everything in their power to limit abortion access -- and I'm angry about it. Enough of the harmful anti-abortion legislation. Enough of the right-wing judge appointments who bring dangerous agendas to the table. Enough of the gag rules meant to limit access to reproductive health services -- disproportionately affecting low-income people and those of color. **As the only U.S. Senator to have worked for Planned Parenthood, I will always defend reproductive freedom. That 's why I'm co-sponsoring the EACH Woman Act, which would repeal the Hyde Amendment and require federal health insurance to cover abortions. This is a necessary step forward in ensuring equal access to our right to abortion care.** **[If you agree that someone's race, zip code, insurance, or gender identity shouldn't determine access to a safe, legal abortion, add your name to this petition. If 5,000 people sign on as citizen co-sponsors of this bill by midnight, we will send a clear message that we're not backing down in this fight.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4c705/c1f7015/60c9173d/11407492/2195381509/VEsC/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201903_each-ld?source=rtw_20190324_em-ld")** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4c705/c1f7015/60c9173d/11407492/2195381509/VEsD/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201903_each-ld?source=rtw_20190324_em-ld") If we don't remain vigilant and fight for our reproductive freedom, Republicans will continue to decimate our rights. Friend, I need you with me in this fight now. More soon, Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-march?refcode=rtw_20190324_em-biobox&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4c705/c1f7015/60c9173d/11407494/2195381509/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: It's Official: No Collusion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
The Mueller Report is in and it confirms what we have been saying all along... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a69ec3e1e7)
---
| |
---
| **It's Official: NO COLLUSION!**
---
| Indiana Republicans,

After all the rampant and unsubstantiated speculation...after all the breathless cable news attacks...and after all the certainty in the liberals' conspiracy theories...the Mueller Report is in and it says what we always knew: NO COLLUSION.

This hoax, perpetuated by the Democrats in Congress and enabled by the mainstream media, said President Trump was guilty long before the report proved he was innocent.
[<<< DEMOCRATS' HOAX EXPOSED. CLICK HERE TO WATCH>>>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fcf027e31d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
But as Trump campaign manager Brad Parscale said, “Today marks the day that President Trump has been completely and fully vindicated by Special Counsel Robert Mueller, exposing the Russia collusion conspiracy theory for the sham that it always was and catching Democrats in an elaborate web of lies and deceit.”

Here’s the Mueller Report by the numbers:
* 2,800 subpoenas
* 500 search warrants
* 500 witness interviews
* 40 FBI agents
* 19 lawyers
* tens of millions of taxpayer dollars

And the overwhelming conclusion is NO COLLUSION.

But you won’t be hearing that from Democrats who will be desperate to save face after forcing our president and our country to endure their hoax since the beginning of the Trump Administration.

These Democrats, [who have been exposed for deceiving us](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bfc661664b&e=1acd9bb3d6) with half-truths and outright lies based on no evidence, will stop at nothing to cherry pick words from this report in an effort to tarnish the president and destroy his presidency.

But what they won’t be able to do is stop President Trump from continuing to grow our economy, add good-paying jobs and protect our interests at home and abroad.

While they swing away, President Trump continues to Make America Great Again and he will for a long, long time to come.

Sincerely,

Kyle Hupfer
Indiana GOP State Chairman

---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=97992768b8&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9642a76689&e=1acd9bb3d6)

clean_body: The Mueller Report is in and it confirms what we have been saying all along... | | | | | | It's Official: NO COLLUSION! | Indiana Republicans, After all the rampant and unsubstantiated speculation...after all the breathless cable news attacks...and after all the certainty in the liberals' conspiracy theories...the Mueller Report is in and it says what we always knew: NO COLLUSION. This hoax, perpetuated by the Democrats in Congress and enabled by the mainstream media, said President Trump was guilty long before the report proved he was innocent. But as Trump campaign manager Brad Parscale said, “Today marks the day that President Trump has been completely and fully vindicated by Special Counsel Robert Mueller, exposing the Russia collusion conspiracy theory for the sham that it always was and catching Democrats in an elaborate web of lies and deceit.” Here’s the Mueller Report by the numbers: 2,800 subpoenas 500 search warrants 500 witness interviews 40 FBI agents 19 lawyers tens of millions of taxpayer dollars And the overwhelming conclusion is NO COLLUSION. But you won’t be hearing that from Democrats who will be desperate to save face after forcing our president and our country to endure their hoax since the beginning of the Trump Administration. These Democrats, with half-truths and outright lies based on no evidence, will stop at nothing to cherry pick words from this report in an effort to tarnish the president and destroy his presidency. But what they won’t be able to do is stop President Trump from continuing to grow our economy, add good-paying jobs and protect our interests at home and abroad. While they swing away, President Trump continues to Make America Great Again and he will for a long, long time to come. Sincerely, Kyle Hupfer Indiana GOP State Chairman | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2019, All rights reserved. Paid for by Indiana Republican Party Authorized by Indiana Republican Party.

name: Megan West
subject: VIDEO: Unplanned Actress Ashley Bratcher
body:
| | Peter, In just five days, the compelling pro-life film UNPLANNED hits theaters across the nation on March 29! UNPLANNED is the powerful true story of Abby Johnson, a former Planned Parenthood Director, who witnessed an ultrasound-guided abortion and became a pro-life advocate. She now exposes the truth about the largest abortion provider in America. In the movie, actress Ashley Bratcher plays Abby Johnson. I had the opportunity to chat with Ashley about what it was like to play the role of Abby in such a monumental film. Listen to Ashley describe how playing this role revealed a stunning piece of her own story. [Watch the My Faith Votes exclusive interview with Ashley below](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k9q6ay7dGV5NLdwSnKxU2N4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190324com01&n=1)! [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k9q6ay7dGV5NLdwSnKxU2N4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190324com01&n=2) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k9q6ay7dGV5NLdwSnKxU2N4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190324com01&n=3) My Faith Votes is thrilled to provide state-of-the-art technology at the end of the film to guide movie-goers to ways they can take action on pro-life issues or access counseling services if they have experienced abortion in their past. We are humbled to play a role in this, and we are praying for the truth to be revealed and healing to take place. If you haven’t already, I encourage you to make plans to see the film and [find a theater near you](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=e2tJmdOoZ5X04TZHkoqVveqXoqSb9oEKoOK7hFKtNSU&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190324com01&n=4)! **United. We Stand.** Megan West
Media Host & Director
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190324com01&n=5)
---
